title: Infosys Announces Strategic Collaboration with OpenAI for Enterprise AI Transformation
detailed_summary: Infosys announced a strategic collaboration with OpenAI to help enterprises transform software development and modernization using OpenAI's frontier AI models and products such as Codex. Infosys will combine OpenAI technology with Infosys Topaz Fabric to support practical, responsible enterprise AI deployment and measurable business outcomes. The collaboration has an early focus on software engineering, legacy modernization, DevOps automation, e-commerce, and other engineering-led domains, aiming to modernize development workflows, improve engineering productivity, accelerate delivery, and reduce time-to-market. No financial value, duration, or revenue impact was disclosed.

important_text_spans.text: Infosys (NSE, BSE, NYSE: INFY), a global leader in AI-first business consulting  and  technology  services,  today  announced  a  strategic  collaboration  with  OpenAI  to  help enterprises  transform  software  development  and  modernization  with  OpenAI's  frontier  AI  models  and products like Codex.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys Announces Strategic Collaboration with OpenAI to Accelerate Enterprise AI Transformation and Unlock AI Value at Scale
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the existence and purpose of the strategic collaboration with OpenAI.

important_text_spans.text: Through this collaboration, Infosys will combine OpenAI's technology with Infosys Topaz Fabric, its purpose-built, composable and open agentic services suite, to help customers move from AI experimentation to practical, responsible deployment and measurable business outcomes.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys Announces Strategic Collaboration with OpenAI to Accelerate Enterprise AI Transformation and Unlock AI Value at Scale
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the integration of OpenAI technology with Infosys Topaz Fabric and the intended customer outcome.

important_text_spans.text: The engagement spans high-impact industry and functional opportunities, with an early focus on software engineering, legacy modernization, DevOps automation, e-commerce, and other engineering-led domains.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys Announces Strategic Collaboration with OpenAI to Accelerate Enterprise AI Transformation and Unlock AI Value at Scale
important_text_spans.reason: Identifies the priority business and functional areas targeted by the collaboration.

important_text_spans.text: By  combining  Codex,  workflow  automation,  and  prebuilt  agents  with  Infosys'  poly-AI  architecture  and enterprise  governance,  the  collaboration  is  designed  to  help  organizations  modernize  development workflows, improve engineering productivity, accelerate delivery, and reduce time-to-market.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys Announces Strategic Collaboration with OpenAI to Accelerate Enterprise AI Transformation and Unlock AI Value at Scale
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the stated operational benefits of the collaboration.

processing_notes: No deal value, duration, financial impact, or customer commitments were disclosed. Generic company profile information and safe harbor language were excluded.
